questions.title: Line Up Students by Height

description.statement: Return the heights sorted from small to large.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(heights)
    for i = 1, #heights - 1 do
        local minIndex = i
        for j = i + 1, #heights do
            if heights[j] < heights[minIndex] then
                minIndex = j
            end
        end
        local temp = heights[i]
        heights[i] = heights[minIndex]
        heights[minIndex] = temp
    end
    return heights
end
